result.title: Issue 1116 — GPS track overlays & tag-based map layer controls

answers.answer:
New GPS track overlay type (file-referenced, not in frontmatter)
Tags on markers, polygons, circles, AND tracks
Native Leaflet layer control to show/hide by tag
Server-side GetTrackGeometry RPC (parse + normalize)
Lazy/progressive track geometry loading in the widget
Hover-revealed track upload in the widget (first FE mutation surface)
Agent-mediated upload/config via MCP tools
Track download link from the widget
Help documentation for all of the above

GPX (tracks + routes) — Rever & Garmin exports
GeoJSON (LineString / MultiLineString / Feature)
Simplify server-side to a point ceiling (recommended)
Visible if ANY enabled tag matches (OR) — recommended
